item.title: mkdocs-ng Maintenance Progress — v1.7.x Fix Summary and Next Steps
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: Since taking over mkdocs-ng maintenance, four versions have been released, over a dozen bugs fixed, and the mergedeep dependency removed. The upcoming v1.8.0 will be a feature release, planning to drop support for older Python versions, remove CDN dependencies from built-in themes, and provide a stable Python API.
